arts.sum: Liverpool resume their Premier League title charge with a match against West Ham at Anfield on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Salah close to SHOCK move before signing new Liverpool contract
arts.sum: Salah finally signed his new Liverpool contract, putting to an end speculation that he could leave for the Saudi Pro League, who have been chasing him for over two years now. Mo Salah considered a shock return to Chelsea before signing his new Liverpool contract.

arts.ttl: Two Liverpool stars drop early team news hints for West Ham amid Arne Slot fitness 'fears'
arts.sum: Liverpool take on West Ham United on Sunday knowing that a win would mean they need just six points to win the Premier League

arts.ttl: Liverpool ‘Accelerating’ Move to Sign ‘Absurd’ Forward Alongside Isak
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to step up their interest in Sheffield United's Ryan One.

arts.ttl: West Ham Chiefs Hold ‘Positive’ Talks to Sign ‘One of the Best Strikers’
arts.sum: Jonathan David is set to leave Lille in the summer and according to recent reports, may be set for a move to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: “Pushing for start” | Early Team News | Liverpool vs West Ham
arts.sum: Niclas Fullkrug is pushing for a start when we face Liverpool at Anfield later today. Although his fitness is to be understandably assessed closely, having recently come back from a serious hamstring injury, many will hope Potter opts to play the German from the off. Reporting on The West Ham Way Patreon, club insider advised... The post “Pushing for start” | Early Team News | Liverpool vs West Ham appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: West Ham hold ‘positive talks’ with top striker target
arts.sum: West Ham United have held ‘positive talks’ with Jonathan David as the club look to win the race to sign the forward. David’s contract at Lille will expire in the summer and the forward looks unlikely to renew his deal with the French side. arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah huge net worth, private wife and Liverpool home that 'looks like a hospital'

arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has finally put pen to paper on a new Liverpool contract after months of speculation, with the Egyptian King set to remain on Merseyside for at least two more years
